code: import MateriaDAO from'../DAO/ManterMateriaDAO';const MateriaRepository={async PesquisaMateria(){return await MateriaDAO.PesquisaMateria();},async PesquisaMateriaPorId(id){return await MateriaDAO.PesquisaMateriaPorId(id);},async CadastroMateria(data){return await MateriaDAO.CadastroMateria(data);},async AtualizarMateria(id,data){return await MateriaDAO.AtualizarMateria(id,data);},async DeletarMateria(id){return await MateriaDAO.DeletarMateria(id);},async PesquisaMateriaPorTexto(term){return await MateriaDAO.PesquisaMateriaPorTexto(term);}};export default MateriaRepository;
